rulings.Case Title: CHARLES SARVER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendant American Optical Corporation'S Motion For Subsequent Deposition Of Plaintiff Charles Sarver
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, February 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant 3M Company's Joinder to American Optical's motion for a subsequent deposition is granted in light of the ruling denying 3M's motion for summary judgment notwithstanding the technical defect to the joinder as explained in court on February 10. The questions at the subsequent deposition by 3M shall not exceed two hours. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES SARVER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Subsequent Deposition Of Plaintiff Charles Sarver.
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, February 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant American Optical Corporation's Motion for Subsequent Deposition of Plaintiff Charles Sarver is continued to the 9:30 calendar to be heard immediately after American Optical's motion for summary judgment. If the motion for summary judgment is denied, the motion for a subsequent deposition is granted but the questions at the subsequent deposition by American Optical shall not exceed two hours. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD RISSE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, February 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, DEFENDANT CALAVERAS ASBESTOS, LTD.'s Notice Of Motion For Sanctions IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. = (220/HEK)
